title: ステータス『つまらない？』

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
Yayyy! I got one! I really got one! Thanks for
coming with me, Bourbon! The store was so
crowded because of the sale. You must be
exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My physical stamina and energy levels are fine,
and I've detected no issues as a result of the sale.
We have accomplished our objective.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Um... But still, I'm sorry. That wasn't
much fun, was it? I mean, I haven't seen you smile
at all today...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That is—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
No, it's okay! You don't have to say anything.
Thanks for coming with me! I'll see ya next time!
Sorry again!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: Did she get the wrong idea?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. It appears she determined that I was
"bored" due to my expression. However, that
conclusion is inaccurate.
choice_data_list: So you had a good time?
So you had a good time?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I completed a difficulty C objective, securing an
item on sale, which also let me see my friend
smile. Therefore, the answer to your question is
"yes."
choice_data_list:
I'm sure the misunderstanding will work itself
out soon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I wonder. Past experience suggests an eighty
percent probability that the same situation will
occur again.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The next time is likely to be... at the costume
party.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That video was just so adorable! We should throw
a costume party, just like the one in the video!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see. I'm pleased you appear to be enjoying
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, just thinking up costume ideas is
super fun!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And, um... the party prep and the party itself are
gonna be super fun too, so...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-would you like to come?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I agreed at the time, but I have determined that
there is a high probability of my presence
dampening the mood.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I had better decline after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon bows slightly and walks off
towards the school building.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, what's with that gloomy face? Is
something on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'd be more than happy to lend you an
ear. ♪ If something's troubling you, a problem
shared is a problem halved.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ah... So that's how Bourbon is feeling? I'm
planning to attend the costume party myself,
but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Right. You can leave this all to me. I'll speak with
Bourbon. After all, the more people that come to
the party, the more fun it'll be!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bourrrbon.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well done with your training. By the way, I heard
you're worried about the costume party.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...You're also attending, correct?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I am. The party's called "The More the Scarier." ♪
So won't you join us, Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But, I...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Rice invited you to the party because you're a
very special friend to her. And to me too, of
course.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're not the slightest bit boring. In fact, if you
don't come, I'll miss you so much I might even
cry...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Understood. I will optimize my conduct for the
event: ensure that my expression remains jovial,
and—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, no. You'll be perfectly fine just as you
are. Forcing yourself to smile is very much a
no-no.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But if I don't...
choice_data_list: I think you're fine just as you are!

How about a costume that'll match your usual
expression?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I'm fine as I am? Without any... special changes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order for everyone to enjoy the party, it's
probably best for Mihono Bourbon to just be
herself. That way she can relax and have a good
time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's right. There's no need to overthink it. We
all want to party with the usual Bourbon we all
know and love. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The usual me...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Acknowledged. I'll research an appropriate
costume and make it as soon as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before anyone can offer to help, Mihono Bourbon
dashes off at astonishing speed.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that's a nice idea too. A costume doesn't
need to transform yourself entirely, after all. It's
just as much fun to think of a costume that's just
right for you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: You mean... a cyborg costume?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That would be wonderful as well. I'm sure
you'd make a very strong and cool cyborg. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Understood. Commencing search for a suitable
costume. I will accomplish this mission no matter
what.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although the goal is simply to have a good time,
Mihono Bourbon faces her mission with steadfast
determination.
